do: Use for single-choice selection over many options where typing-to-filter helps.
Use the ComboboxChips* parts for multi-select (they bind the --ds-chip-* tokens).
Use ComboboxTrigger/Value/Clear/Label/Collection for a select-like closed surface.
dont: Don't use Combobox for a handful of options with no search need — use select.
Don't use Combobox as an actions menu — use dropdown-menu or command.

boundaries: Figma naming trap: in Figma this component is the set named "Select" on the dropdown-menu page (node 1292:5274) — resolve duplicates by node ID, not display name.

whenToUseInstead.when: a short, known option list without search
